scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.check:backend: node --check backend/app.js && node --check backend/index.js && node --check backend/controllers/authController.js && node --check backend/controllers/bookingController.js && node --check backend/controllers/chatController.js && node --check backend/controllers/marketplaceController.js && node --check backend/controllers/workerController.js && node --check backend/controllers/adminController.js && node --check backend/controllers/notificationController.js && node --check backend/scripts/seed.js
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:backend && npm test --prefix backend
